assumptions: No Sumo Logic account, organization, region selection, identity-provider configuration, collector, source, or ingested data is assumed.
The email candidate assumes access to a business email inbox and accurate contact and organization details.
No signup, agreement acceptance, email activation, region selection, login, collector installation, or data ingestion was performed during research.

developer_goal: Create a Sumo Logic trial account and reach the preloaded Kickstart sample dashboard that shows key performance metrics without configuring ingestion.

first_success.outcome: A newly activated trial user sees preloaded Kickstart sample data and an application, business, or security dashboard without configuring a collector or ingesting real data.
first_success.observable_signal: The Get Started experience displays a sample dashboard with preloaded log data and visible key performance metrics.

route_selection.surface: Business email activation to Kickstart sample dashboard
route_selection.rule: Select the lexicographically shortest complete official route to the same first-success outcome after fixing product intent; if peer routes remain consequential, mark needs-human-judgment.

candidates.name: Business email activation to Kickstart sample dashboard
candidates.reason: Recorded as a reconstructable candidate, but public evidence does not close signup-field opacity and/or peer-route lexicographic selection for a verified count.

candidates.name: Google SSO signup
candidates.reason: This is a two-step documented signup branch, but it delegates identity selection and authentication to Google.

candidates.name: AWS Marketplace signup
candidates.reason: This creates a new Sumo Logic organization through a paid marketplace relationship and can convert to paid billing after the 30-day trial.

candidates.name: Ingest the developer's own data
candidates.reason: This requires selecting AWS, Kubernetes, Linux, Windows, or macOS and then a collector or source path, while Kickstart Data is preloaded on first login without setup.

required_path.action: Complete Sumo Logic account creation or trial signup at the official entry URL.

required_fields.label: Signup identity and required account fields
required_fields.notes: Public evidence does not establish the complete current required field set behind the client-rendered or authenticated signup surface.

required_path.observable_result: A new Sumo Logic account or trial session exists.

required_path.action: Complete any required email or identity verification for the new account.
required_path.observable_result: The account becomes usable for developer onboarding.

required_path.action: Complete the documented post-login setup for the selected Sumo Logic candidate through first success.

required_fields.label: Candidate-specific configuration
required_fields.notes: Exact fields depend on unresolved product, auth, or framework selection.

required_path.observable_result: The Get Started experience displays a sample dashboard with preloaded log data and visible key performance metrics.

prerequisites.description: {'order': 1, 'type': 'identity', 'requirement': 'Choose Google SSO, business email, or AWS Marketplace as the account route; the reconstructed candidate uses business email.', 'required': True, 'source_ids': ['S2', 'S4']}

{'order': 2, 'type': 'legal', 'requirement': 'The direct email form requires agreement to the Sumo Logic Service License Agreement; region-specific personal-information choices can also appear during account completion.', 'required': True, 'source_ids': ['S4']}
{'order': 3, 'type': 'region', 'requirement': "Select the AWS region where Sumo Logic will store the account's data, based on data-residency needs.", 'required': True, 'source_ids': ['S4']}

external_gates.description: Google SSO, business email, and AWS Marketplace change identity, verification, agreement, and billing actions.
The business-email path requires work contact and organization data across an initial and a completion form.
Email activation must be completed within three days or signup must be repeated.

unavoidable_waits.description: Email or identity-provider verification delivery when the selected account route requires it.

platform_outcomes.description: This dashboard will give you an instant view of key performance metrics using Kickstart sample data.

excluded.reason: Listed as excluded after success in the source record.

uncertainties.question: Which identity and commercial route should represent Sumo Logic's general first mile?
uncertainties.impact: Google, email, and AWS Marketplace produce different screen counts, credentials, agreements, billing effects, and external dependencies.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Resolve against current official docs and a dated fresh-account or cold walkthrough: The official signup guide presents all three without selecting a universal default.

uncertainties.question: Does email activation automatically authenticate the new account, or is a separate first login required?
uncertainties.impact: The candidate path may contain one conditional authentication step before the Get Started page.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Resolve against current official docs and a dated fresh-account or cold walkthrough: The signup guide states the post-activation onboarding and supported sign-in methods but does not specify session continuity after the current Get started control.

uncertainties.question: Should sample-data visibility or the developer's own data define workshop first success?
uncertainties.impact: Choosing own data adds a platform-specific collector, source, installation path, and wait; choosing Kickstart stops on first login.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Resolve against current official docs and a dated fresh-account or cold walkthrough: The quickstart deliberately offers immediate sample data before the real-data collection journey.

uncertainties.question: What exact current required signup, identity, legal, and entitlement fields does Sumo Logic show for a new developer, and which peer route is the lexicographic shortest path?
uncertainties.impact: Without those fields and a closed route choice, action and field counts cannot be verified for peer comparison.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated read-only walkthrough of the live signup and the selected post-login first-success path, with screenshots of required fields and confirmation that peer routes are longer or gated.
